mapper.sql: SELECT TU.USER_ID AS USER_ID , TU.USER_NAME AS USER_NAME , TU.ROLE_ID AS ROLE_ID , (SELECT COMMON_CODE_NAME FROM TB_COMMON_CODE TCC WHERE TCC.COMMON_CODE = TU.GENDER_CODE AND TCC.GROUP_CODE = 'GENDER') AS GENDER_CODE_NAME , TU.GENDER_CODE AS GENDER_CODE , TU.ADDRESS AS ADDRESS , TU.PHONE AS PHONE , TU.STAR_SIGN AS STAR_SIGN , TU.STATUS AS STATUS , TU.PASSWORD AS PASSWORD , TU.USE_YN AS USE_YN , TU.CREATE_USER_ID AS CREATE_USER_ID , TU.UPDATE_USER_ID AS UPDATE_USER_ID , TU.CREATE_DATE AS CREATE_DATE , TU.UPDATE_DATE AS UPDATE_DATE
mapper.select:
FROM TB_USER TU
ORDER BY TU.CREATE_DATE DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_USER
USER_NAME = #{vo.userName},
GENDER_CODE = #{vo.genderCode},
ADDRESS = #{vo.address},
PHONE = #{vo.phone},
STAR_SIGN = #{vo.starSign},
STATUS = #{vo.status},
USE_YN = #{vo.useYn},
UPDATE_USER_ID = #{vo.updateUserId}, UPDATE_DATE = NOW()
WHERE USER_ID = #{vo.userId}
